STATUS: todo
PROJECT: Ultimate Workbench
EXECUTION_TARGET: remote-vm-dry-lease

Objective: verify the remote VM/browser/sandbox lane can perform a safe readiness probe without starting containers or consuming heavy RAM.

Hard constraints:
- Dry run only. Do not start containers, pull images, build images, open browsers, or launch GUI sessions.
- Read-only. No repo edits, no daemon mutation, no destructive commands.
- No token, OAuth, API key, cookie, raw env, or private credential printing.
- Keep final comment under 700 words.

Required checks:
1. Runtime identity and pressure: hostname, pwd, uname, free -h, df -h .
2. Tool readiness: command -v docker, docker version or docker ps if safe; command -v chromium/google-chrome if available; command -v python3.
3. Confirm lane constraints from this issue and state whether actual VM smoke should be allowed in a follow-up.
4. Do not use repo checkout unless necessary.
